name: LlamaIndex
description: Data framework and cloud platform for LLM apps over private data. Offers parsing, indexing, retrieval, agent workflows, and evaluation across 160+ data sources.

skills.name: Data Ingestion
skills.description: Load and parse 160+ data source types including PDFs, databases, APIs, and web pages

skills.name: Vector Indexing
skills.description: Index documents into vector stores with configurable chunking and embedding strategies

skills.name: Query Engine
skills.description: Run semantic search and sub-question decomposition over indexed data with one API call

skills.name: Agent Tools
skills.description: Wrap retrieval pipelines as LLM tools for use in ReAct and function-calling agent loops

skills.name: RAG Evaluation
skills.description: Evaluate faithfulness, relevancy, and correctness of retrieval-augmented generation pipelines
